challenge.name: Innovation Challenge on Generative AI Applications for Enterprise Scenarios Using OPEA

default_submission_fields.method_name: WearEdge Pro: OPEA Manufacturing Five-Agent Suite
default_submission_fields.method_description: WearEdge Pro is a wearable edge AI suite for Manufacturing. A Vuzix M400 or API request captures first-person evidence, an OPEA-style Gateway and Manufacturing Megaservice route it through Dataprep, RAG, Vector DB, LLM adapter, deterministic evaluators, and route-specific guardrails, then return auditable action cards for plant workflows. The submission includes five runnable agents: maintenance / CMMS work order, IQC / QMS quality event, changeover / checklist verification, WI / released instruction guidance, and hazard / EHS observation. Maintenance remains the hero lao-shi-fu demo, while all five routes are runnable through one Docker Compose profile and scorecard.

do_not_claim_until_implemented.production embedding service: The committed demo uses deterministic hashing embeddings. Add an OPEA embedding microservice or production embedding model before claiming production-grade semantic embeddings.
do_not_claim_until_implemented.Intel hardware optimization: Benchmark harness and local Intel Core Ultra smoke test are included. Rerun on a Xeon host with AVX-512/AMX flags before claiming the Intel AVX-512/AMX bonus.
do_not_claim_until_implemented.OPEA public contribution: Public RFC issue is posted at https://github.com/opea-project/GenAIExamples/issues/2461. PR remains pending maintainer feedback.
do_not_claim_until_implemented.external video publication: Demo script and captions are included. Replace or supplement publication_url after the public demo video is uploaded.
